fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for a product family.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional description of the product family if there is not enough space in the Description field.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the family is blocked. This field is for information only and does not affect the posting in transactions.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the standard data of this production family was last modified.

fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the routing which is used for the production of the family.
